title: Government and Politics
summary: This chapter was merged into Florida Chapter 10: Public Institutions: Religion, Education, and Government. The standalone chapter on government and politics — covering power, authority, forms of government, U.S. politics, and theoretical perspectives on power — was eliminated and compressed alongside religion and education. See Chapter 15 for a detailed comparison.

changes.original_text: Chapter 17: Government and Politics was merged into Florida Chapter 10. The standalone treatment of government and politics was eliminated.
changes.context: Entire chapter merged with Chapters 15 and 16 into Florida Ch 10. See Chapter 15 comparison for details.
